storyboard.content: I've been getting strange tingling and pins-and-needles sensations in both my hands and feet.
My hands feel clumsy — I'm struggling to button my shirt and I keep dropping things.
Sometimes it feels like I'm wearing invisible gloves.
It started in my toes and has slowly crept up to my ankles over the past 4 months.
It's getting in the way of daily tasks, especially anything that needs fine motor control like typing, but I can still work.
The numbness and clumsiness are most noticeable when I'm doing detailed tasks with my hands.
